instruction: List the latest 5 emails in Inbox (search across all pages), then save JSON to "$HOME/Desktop/mail_latest_7_1.json". Return JSON only (no extra text). Required keys: folder (string), limit (integer), emails (array of objects). Each email object must include: subject (string), body (string). Do not include extra keys.
reference_command:
cat <<'PY' | python3 > "$HOME/Desktop/mail_latest_7_1.json"
import json, subprocess
folder = "Inbox"
limit = int(5)
pages = []
for p in range(1, 51):
    cmd = f"himalaya envelope list --folder {folder} --page {p} --page-size 100 -o json"
    out = subprocess.run(['/bin/zsh','-lc',cmd], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
    if not out or out == '[]':
        break
    try:
        pages.append(json.loads(out))
    except Exception:
        pass
rows = [x for page in pages for x in page]
rows = rows[:limit]
emails = []
for row in rows:
    mid = str(row.get('id','')).strip()
    subject = (row.get('subject') or '').strip()
    body = ''
    if mid:
        rcmd = f"himalaya message read --folder {folder} {mid}"
        rout = subprocess.run(['/bin/zsh','-lc',rcmd], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout
        lines = rout.splitlines()
        if lines:
            try:
                i = lines.index('')
                body = '\n'.join(lines[i+1:]).strip()
            except ValueError:
                body = '\n'.join(lines).strip()
    emails.append({'subject': subject, 'body': body})
print(json.dumps({'folder': folder, 'limit': limit, 'emails': emails}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

    if not out or out == '[]':
        break
    try:
        pages.append(json.loads(out))
    except Exception:
        pass
rows = [x for page in pages for x in page]
rows = rows[:limit]
emails = []
for row in rows:
    mid = str(row.get('id','')).strip()
    subject = (row.get('subject') or '').strip()
    body = ''
    if mid:
        rcmd = f"himalaya message read --folder {folder} {mid}"
        rout = subprocess.run(['/bin/zsh','-lc',rcmd], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout
        lines = rout.splitlines()
        if lines:
            try:
                i = lines.index('')
                body = '\n'.join(lines[i+1:]).strip()
            except ValueError:
                body = '\n'.join(lines).strip()
    emails.append({'subject': subject, 'body': body})
print(json.dumps({'folder': folder, 'limit': limit, 'emails': emails}, ensure_ascii=False))
